measures.name: C-FORECAST
measures.description: The C-FORECAST measure uses a SWITCH function to return the sum of TOTALUNITS from the COLESFORECAST table if the maximum customer name in the ITEMS table is 'STRING LITERAL', or the sum of BASELINEUNITS from the WWFORECAST table if the maximum customer name in the ITEMS table is 'STRING LITERAL'. If neither condition is met, it returns a blank value.

measures.name: DISTRIBUTION
measures.description: The DISTRIBUTIONRANGED measure uses a SWITCH function to return different average values based on the maximum customer value in the ITEMS table. If the maximum customer value equals a certain string literal, it returns the average of WDIST in the METCASHWH table. If the maximum customer value equals another string literal, it returns the average of NDISTRANGED in the SCAN table. If neither condition is met, it returns a blank value.

measures.name: RSV
measures.description: The 'RSV' measure calculates the sum of sales for specific customer and state conditions across five different cases. The measure returns the sum of these five cases, which include conditions based on customer and customer code selections, as well as state selections.

measures.name: RSV PY
measures.description: The 'RSV PY' measure checks if the maximum value of the 'GROUP' column equals a specific string. If it does, it returns the 'RSV PY-DAY' measure. Otherwise, it calculates the 'RSV' measure for the same period in the previous year.

measures.name: UNITS PY-DAY
measures.description: The 'UNITS PY' measure checks if the maximum value of the 'GROUP' column equals a specific string. If it does, it calculates the 'UNITS PY-DAYCALC' measure. Otherwise, it calculates the 'SCANUNITSMEASURE' for the same period in the previous year.

measures.name: SCANUNITSMEASURE
measures.description: The SCANUNITSMEASURE is a complex measure that calculates the sum of scan units based on various conditions related to the customer and state. It uses six different cases, each of which checks for specific customer or customer code values and state values, and calculates the sum of scan units accordingly. The final result is the sum of all these cases.

measures.name: USWAVERAGE
measures.description: The 'USWAVERAGE' measure calculates the average of the 'USWCALC' measure for each unique date in the 'DATE' table. It maintains any filters that have been applied to the data.

measures.name: RANK
measures.description: The 'RANK' measure uses a SWITCH function to return different rank values based on the maximum value of the 'CATEGORY' column. If the maximum value is a specific string literal, it returns the dense rank of 'BRAND' or 'PRODUCT' within the selected items, ordered by the 'SCANUNITSMEASURE' in descending order.

measures.name: M-FORECAST
measures.description: The 'M-FORECAST' measure represents the forecasted value of the 'SELLTHRU_UNITS' measure. It is used to predict future sales units based on historical data.

measures.name: PROMOTYPECOMMENTS
measures.description: The 'PROMOTYPECOMMENTS' measure checks if the maximum value in the 'PROMOCODE' column of the 'FORECAST' table is blank. If it is, the measure returns a blank value; otherwise, it returns the maximum 'PROMOCODE'.

measures.name: TACTICCOMMENTS
measures.description: The 'TACTICCOMMENTS' measure checks if the maximum value in the 'TACTIC' column of the 'FORECAST' table is blank. If it is, it returns a blank value; otherwise, it returns the maximum value.

measures.name: AVERAGEPRICE
measures.description: The AVERAGEPRICE measure calculates the average price of items. It uses a SWITCH function to determine whether to calculate the average price based on the METCASHWH[PRICE] field (if the maximum value of the ITEMS[CUSTOMER] field equals a specific string literal) or the SCAN[PRICE] field.

measures.name: USW PY
measures.description: The 'USW PY' measure checks if the maximum value of the 'GROUP' column equals a specific string. If it does, it returns the 'USW PY-DAY' measure. Otherwise, it calculates the 'USWAVERAGE' measure for the same period in the previous year.

measures.name: COLESUSW
measures.description: The COLESUSW measure calculates the sum of the USW column in the SCAN table, but only for rows where the STATE column equals a specific string literal, the CHANNEL column equals another specific string literal, and the CUSTOMER column in the ITEMS table equals yet another specific string literal. This measure is used to filter and aggregate data based on specific criteria.

measures.name: WWUSW
measures.description: The WWUSW measure calculates the sum of USW from the SCAN table if the DISTRIBUTIONRANGED is greater than 0.25. It applies filters to keep only the records where the STATE in the SCAN table matches a specific string literal and the CUSTOMER in the ITEMS table also matches a specific string literal. If the DISTRIBUTIONRANGED is not greater than 0.25, it returns a blank value.

measures.name: PRICE PY
measures.description: The measure 'PRICE PY' calculates the average price from the same period in the previous year using the 'DATE' table.

measures.name: DISTRIBUTION PY
measures.description: The measure 'DISTRIBUTION PY' calculates the distribution range for the same period in the previous year, but only if the units from the previous year are greater than zero.

measures.name: RANK PY
measures.description: The 'RANK PY' measure calculates the rank of a value in the same period of the previous year, but only if the 'UNITS PY' measure is greater than zero.

measures.name: BLANK
measures.description: The measure **`BLANK`** returns a blank value using **`CALCULATE(BLANK())`**. This measure will always output a blank result, regardless of the current context in the Power BI report. It effectively serves as a placeholder or can be used to intentionally return no value in certain scenarios.

measures.name: RSV PY-DAY
measures.description: The 'RSV PY-DAY' measure calculates the 'RSV' value for the same week number and day of the week in the previous year. It does this by filtering all dates to only include those that match the current maximum week number, day of the week, and the previous calendar year.

measures.name: USW PY-DAY
measures.description: The 'USW PY-DAY' measure calculates the average USW value for the same week number and day of the week in the previous year. It uses the 'USWAVERAGE' measure and filters the 'DATE' table to match the current week number, day of the week, and the previous calendar year.

measures.name: REMITCLAIMS $
measures.description: The 'REMITCLAIMS $' measure calculates the total sum of the 'VALUE' column in the 'CLAIMS' table. This measure is used to determine the total value of all claims.

measures.name: REMITCLAIMUNITS
measures.description: The REMITCLAIMUNITS measure calculates the total sum of units from the CLAIMS table.

measures.name: REMITCLAIMEDREDEMPTION
measures.description: The REMITCLAIMEDREDEMPTION measure calculates the ratio of REMITCLAIMUNITS to SCANUNITSMEASURE. If SCANUNITSMEASURE is zero, the result is blank.

measures.name: ESTIMATECLAIMS
measures.description: The ESTIMATECLAIMS measure calculates the total estimated claims. It does this by multiplying the measure of scan units by the sell-in redemption, and then multiplying that result by the sell-through unit deal for each row in the SCAN table, and then summing up all these results.

measures.name: PRICE PY-DAY
measures.description: The 'PRICE PY-DAY' measure calculates the average price on the same day of the week in the same week number of the previous year. It uses the 'AVERAGEPRICE' measure and filters the 'DATE' table to match the current week number, day of the week, and the previous calendar year.

measures.name: MAXDATE
measures.description: The MAXDATE measure calculates the latest date in the SCAN table.

measures.name: USWCALC
measures.description: The USWCALC measure uses a SWITCH function to return the sum of COLESUSW if the maximum value of ITEMS[CUSTOMER] equals a specific string literal, or the sum of WWUSW if the maximum value of ITEMS[CUSTOMER] equals a different specific string literal.

measures.name: REMITUNITDEAL
measures.description: The REMITUNITDEAL measure represents the maximum unit deal value from the CLAIMS table.

measures.name: HURDLERATE
measures.description: The 'HURDLERATE' measure uses a conditional IF and SWITCH statement to assign different values based on the maximum values of 'CUSTOMER' and 'SUB-CATEGORY' in the 'ITEMS' table. If the maximum value of 'MEASURESELECT1' equals a specific string, the measure will return a specific value or calculate the median of 'USW' for all items except a specific sub-category.

measures.name: METCASHASATDATE
measures.description: The METCASHASATDATE measure calculates the maximum value of the PROMOWEEKSTART field in the METCASHWH table. This measure is used to identify the latest promotional week start date.

measures.name: CHECK
measures.description: The measure **`CHECK`** returns `1` if either **`SCANUNITSMEASURE`** or **`UNITS PY-DAY`** is greater than 0; otherwise, it returns `0`. It uses the **`IF`** and **`OR`** functions to evaluate the conditions based on the current context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: COSTCOPRICE
measures.description: The measure **`COSTCOPRICE`** calculates the average of the **`Average_Price_per_Unit`** column from the **`COSTCOSCAN`** table, based on the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: COSTCORSV
measures.description: The measure **`COSTCORSV`** calculates the total sum of the **`Gross_Monetary_Sales`** column from the **`COSTCOSCAN`** table, considering the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: COSTCOUNITS
measures.description: The measure **`COSTCOUNITS`** calculates the total sum of the **`Gross_Units`** column from the **`COSTCOSCAN`** table, based on the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: SELLTHROUGH_REDEMPTIONMEASURE
measures.description: The measure **`SELLTHROUGH_REDEMPTIONMEASURE`** calculates the maximum value of the **`REDEMPTION`** column in the **`DEMAND`** table, adjusting dynamically to any filters applied in the current context of the Power BI report.

measures.name: SELLTHROUGH_UNITDEAL
measures.description: The measure **`SELLTHROUGH_UNITDEAL`** returns the maximum value from the **`UNITDEAL`** column in the **`DEMAND`** table, based on the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: SELLTHROUGH_VARIABLEPROMO
measures.description: The measure **`SELLTHROUGH_VARIABLEPROMO`** calculates the total sum of the **`VARIABLEPROMO`** column from the **`DEMAND`** table, considering the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: SKUCOUNT
measures.description: The measure **`SKUCOUNT`** calculates the distinct count of values in the **`EAN`** column from the **`ITEMS`** table. It returns the number of unique SKUs (Stock Keeping Units) based on the current filter context in the Power BI report.

measures.name: Promo Event Start, High Flag by Assortment
Promo Event Start, Medium Flag by Assortment
Promo Event Start, Low Flag by Assortment
